# Description
Describe clearly what was done, why it was needed and which problem was solved.

---
# Tests
- [ ] Tested locally
- [ ] Automated coverage updated when applicable
- [ ] Integration with `develop` verified

---
# Change Type
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Bugfix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Configuration

---
# Checklist
- [ ] The code follows the project standards
- [ ] The changes were tested
- [ ] The branch is updated from `develop`
- [ ] The PR was reviewed when required

# Related Issue
Closes #issue-number
